filtered_articles.title: The 35 Best Gaming Deals in the Prime Day Sales — Hand-Picked by Our Deals Experts
filtered_articles.description: There's a surprisingly healthy amount of video game deals up for grabs in the 2026 Prime Day sales, including some killer discounts for PS5, Switch, and even Xbox owners. (I promise I haven't forgotten you.)

filtered_articles.title: Score Over $80 Off a PlayStation Portal for Prime Day

filtered_articles.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 Has Dropped to Its Lowest Price at Amazon for Prime Day
filtered_articles.description: Amazon has dropped the price of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 to $39.99 as part of its Prime Day sale. That's a 20% discount from its full price of $49.99.

filtered_articles.description: If you're looking for a capable streaming 4K box, now might be the time to jump on the Google TV Streamer 4K.
